meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no testing knowledge. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Solving No-Test SaaS Projects (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop losing clients to bugs. Master freelance pitching for testing-heavy projects using Antigravity and Claude Code. A pro-grade guide for elite AI builders.
content.answer_block: Transform your freelance pitch by framing automated testing as a 'Risk Mitigation' product rather than a technical chore. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid test scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous bug remediation, you convert 'no testing' projects into high-margin, reliable delivery contracts that justify premium billing rates.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a project brief that screams potential, but there’s a gaping hole: zero test coverage. For most freelancers, this is a red flag that leads to late-night emergency patches and eroding margins. You want the contract, but you fear the technical debt that comes with undocumented, untested logic.

It’s time to stop fearing the codebase and start commoditizing quality. By integrating automated testing into your pitch, you move from being a 'code monkey' to a 'systems architect.' This guide shows you how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to turn a liability into your most powerful selling point.

steps.title: The Audit Pitch
steps.description: Perform a 'Risk Assessment' audit on the client's existing repo. Present this as a value-add to win trust before you write a single line of production code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for critical failure points. Generate a report detailing potential edge cases where the current logic would break under high load.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src --prompt 'Identify the three most critical functions that lack unit tests and explain why they are risky.'

steps.title: Automated Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate high-coverage test suites instantly, demonstrating to the client that you have a system for stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive Jest test suite for the identified high-risk modules. Include mocks for all external API dependencies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx jest --init' && claude run 'npm install --save-dev jest'

steps.title: The 'Shield' Implementation
steps.description: Implement a CI/CD integration that runs your new tests on every push. Pitch this as a 'Quality Shield' that protects the client's investment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs the generated test suite on every pull request and blocks merges on failure.

steps.title: Autonomous Remediation
steps.description: Set up Claude Code to monitor test failures and suggest fixes. Show the client that your code self-heals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a configuration for Claude Code to monitor test output logs and automatically draft patches for failing tests.

steps.title: Performance Benchmarking
steps.description: Pitch load testing as a premium service to verify the system can handle the client's expected user growth.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a k6 load testing script that simulates 500 concurrent users hitting the primary API endpoints.

pro_tips: Never pitch 'testing' as a line item; pitch it as 'Reliability Insurance' to justify a 20% price premium.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation alongside tests; clients love having a living manual they can actually read.
Always include a 'Regression Guarantee' in your contract, backed by the test suite you built.
If a client refuses testing, offer a 'Safety Audit' session as a paid pilot project to prove the value.
Automate your test reports into Slack/Discord notifications to make your high-quality work visible to the client daily.
content.next_steps: Take these automated testing workflows and package them into a reusable template repository. Use this template for every new client proposal to slash your setup time by 80%.
content.conversion_block: Stop losing money on maintenance and start billing for professional-grade stability. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
